Title: User initiates registration
Test Data: Valid email, password, and personal details
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page
2. Enter valid email, password, and personal details
3. Click the "Register" button
Expected Result: User is successfully registered, and a confirmation message is displayed

Title: Registration triggers notification
Test Steps:
1. User registers successfully
2. Check the Notification center for a new notification
Expected Result: A new notification is present in the Notification center

Title: Notification triggers event creation
Preconditions: A new user has been registered
Test Steps:
1. Check the Notification center for a new notification
2. Click the notification that triggers event creation

Title: Event creation
Preconditions: A new user has been registered and a notification to create an event has been triggered
Test Data: Valid event details (title, description, date, location)
Test Steps:
1. Click the notification that triggers event creation
2. Enter valid event details
3. Click the "Create" button
Expected Result: A new event is created with the provided details

Title: User joins an event
Preconditions: A new user has been registered, and an event has been created
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the event page
2. Enter the valid event ID
3. Click the "Join" button
Expected Result: User is successfully joined to the event

Title: User sees flash messages
Preconditions: User has performed an action that triggers a flash message
Test Steps:
1. Perform an action that triggers a flash message
2. Check the Flash activity for the message

Title: User accesses their profile
Preconditions: User has registered and logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page
2. Check the user's personal details

Title: User initiates login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Click the "Login" button
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in, and a confirmation message is displayed

Title: User initiates newsletter activity
Expected Result: User is on the newsletter page

Title: Newsletter management interacts with project data
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid email addresses and newsletter content
2. Click the "Send" button
Expected Result: Newsletters are sent to the provided email addresses with the specified content

Title: Project data management uses PostgreSQL
Test Steps: 1. Check the PostgreSQL database for newsletter data
Expected Result: Newsletter data is stored in the PostgreSQL database
